content.en:
Ye Tian didn't care about these Nine Realms pinnacles trapped in the Abyss of Eternal Night, he was only thinking about seizing the Stone of Eternal Night now.

"Perhaps wait for the day when the Beast of the Eternal Night arrives to get a glimpse of the true secrets. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

He was very curious about why the Beast of the Eternal Night had come to the Abyss of Eternal Night after a long period of time, and then left again in a short period of time, it was definitely not the Stone of Eternal Night, otherwise it would not have been possible to comprehend such a short period of time.

So, he had to wait for the beast of the eternal night.

With his current strength, even if the cultivation of this copied body is still at the peak of the Nine Realms, his understanding of the Eternal Night Ultimate System and other Ultimate Systems has reached a new level, and he has created a joint Ultimate Dimension Killing Attack Abyss Spear, and the combat power exerted is definitely no less than that of the weaker Ultimate Realm Lord.

And the strength of the Beast of the Eternal Night is at most this level.

It shouldn't be long before the Beast of the "Eternal Night" 290 arrives. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Some time later, the Beast of the Eternal Night finally arrived.

Those existences at the peak of the Nine Realms were hiding from the Beast of the Eternal Night one by one, even if they were crazy, they also knew that they were afraid, where they dared to provoke the Beast of the Eternal Night.

"It's coming!"

The massive beast of the eternal night emerged from the void and came to the Stone of the Eternal Night.

Its terrifying aura was enough to make those Nine Realm peaks have no power to resist, but it had no effect on Ye Tian.

This beast of the eternal night noticed Ye Tian and immediately wanted to swallow Ye Tian, but no matter what it did, it couldn't suck Ye Tian over.

Wow!

An eternal night aurora killed, and Ye Tian also performed his own joint ultimate dimensional killing move-the Yuan Spear!

Bang!!!!

Two attacks collided, and no one could help anyone?

Immediately afterwards, Ye Tian and the Beast of the Eternal Night continued to fight, both of which were equal to each other.

However, after killing for a long time, Ye Tian did not fight with the Beast of the Eternal Night, but stood in the distance.

The Beast of the Eternal Night also knew that he couldn't help Ye Tian, so he didn't attack Ye Tian anymore and began to do his own thing.

It spits out a large amount of black matter, which is constantly fused into the Stone of the Night.

Seeing this scene, Ye Tian was shocked.

It turns out that the Beast of the Eternal Night comes every long time to fuse these black substances into the Stone of the Eternal Night, but what is it for?

He didn't stop it, but kept watching.

It was a long time before the Beast of the Eternal Night poured enough black substance into the Stone of Eternal Night, and mobilized the power of the entire Abyss of Eternal Night to pour it into it.

Ye Tian waited quietly like this, he knew that the Beast of the Eternal Night would probably take a long time to leave.

"It seems that you must leave with the Beast of the Night to learn the secrets of the Beast of the Night. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

It's not that he didn't think about copying the body of the Eternal Night Beast, but the copied Eternal Night Beast is not powerful, because the real Eternal Night Beast can mobilize the power of the Eternal Night Abyss, which is the root of its strength.

Just the Eternal Night Beast's copy body was simply an ultimate creature comparable to the pinnacle of the Nine Realms, and it didn't make much sense.

Another period of time has passed.

Ye Tian sensed that the Beast of the Eternal Night was leaving, and immediately rushed over.

At this time, the Beast of the Eternal Night attacked again.

However, Ye Tian took the initiative to be swallowed by the Beast of the Eternal Night.

......

Inside the beast of the eternal night.

Ye Tian was constantly attacked by the power of the Eternal Night Beast, and countless black liquids devoured him, but Ye Tian resisted with his strong body.

After a long time, the Beast of the Eternal Night still did not kill Ye Tian, and could only choose to leave the Abyss of Eternal Night.

"The Beast of the Eternal Night has left the Abyss of the Night!"

Ye Tian was overjoyed, maybe he would know the truth about the Beast of the Eternal Night.

Airplanes!

The beast of the eternal night shuttled away, and soon came to an unknown land.

Ye Tian saw that the Beast of the Eternal Night had finally stopped, and immediately tried to rush out of the Beast of the Eternal Night, but the Beast of the Eternal Night did not stop it.

Coming out of the body of the Eternal Night Beast, Ye Tian found himself in a long black river.

And the beast of the eternal night did not attack him, but silently drew wisps of breath from the black river to condense a black substance.

Seeing this, Ye Tian understood that the Beast of the Eternal Night was absorbing the black substance from this long black river, and after gathering enough black substance, it entered the Abyss of Eternal Night, and then poured these substances into the Stone of Eternal Night.

The Beast of the Eternal Night is like a programmed program that does this all the time.

And what is this place?

Immediately, he moved along the long black river..........

After a long time, he came to the depths of the black river.

Here he saw a ruined palace.

He was very vigilant, and first copied a replica body to prevent his own replica body from falling, so that he could not enter again.

It was only then that he entered the dilapidated palace.

Suddenly.

He noticed a corpse lying on an ancient throne, the other party didn't know how long it had been dead, but the aura was still terrifying, and it was definitely not an ordinary Ultimate Realm Lord.

"This should be some first-grade Ultimate Realm Lord!"

Ye Tian guessed.

He sensed it and found that there were countless cracks on this Ultimate Realm Lord's body, and his entire body seemed to be swept through by a terrifying force, causing his body to shatter into countless pieces, but he was too strong for his physical body to truly disintegrate.

He couldn't understand that such a strong man could be killed by such an injury.

"Could it be the power of the Dimensional Sea?"

Ye Tian guessed.

Soon, he began to explore the ruined palace.

Soon, in the depths of the ruined palace, he found a stone of eternal night.

That's right, it's the Stone of the Night, and it's a very large Stone of the Night.

However, something wasn't quite right with the Stone of the Night, it seemed to be cracked, and there were many cracks in it.

By this time, he had already roughly guessed something.

That beast of the eternal night should be cultivated by this 0.7 mysterious powerhouse, according to his orders, go to the abyss of eternal night to cultivate the stone of eternal night, and bring it back once the cultivation is completed.

Perhaps this Stone of the Eternal Night was brought back after the Beast of the Night was cultivated, and the Beast of the Night continued to cultivate the Stone of the Night.

Unfortunately, its owner has long since fallen.

In addition, the beast of the eternal night has been transformed, everything is done according to instinct, and there is no wisdom, otherwise, it is impossible for Ye Tian to enter here.

"What's inside this Eternal Night Stone?"

Ye Tian tried to attack the Stone of Eternal Night.

Rumble!!!

He kept attacking, slowly widening the cracks in the Stone of the Night.

After a long time.

Click!

The Stone of the Eternal Night shattered completely, revealing the contents of the Stone of the Night.
